# ff-button

## Properties

| Property       | Attribute       | Description                                                                                                                                 | Type                                         | Default     |
| -------------- | --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `brand`        | `brand`         | Brand key resolved against the external CSS token contract. This stays open so apps can ship brand overrides outside the component package. | `string`                                     | `'inherit'` |
| `disabled`     | `disabled`      |                                                                                                                                             | `boolean`                                    | `false`     |
| `fullWidth`    | `full-width`    |                                                                                                                                             | `boolean`                                    | `false`     |
| `label`        | `label`         |                                                                                                                                             | `string \| undefined`                        | `undefined` |
| `previewState` | `preview-state` |                                                                                                                                             | `"active" \| "auto" \| "default" \| "hover"` | `'auto'`    |
| `theme`        | `theme`         | Theme key resolved against the external CSS token contract. Consumers can keep the shipped `light` / `dark` values or define their own.     | `string`                                     | `'inherit'` |
| `type`         | `type`          |                                                                                                                                             | `"button" \| "reset" \| "submit"`            | `'button'`  |
